ghidra.effect_summary: This child record currently stands on Microsoft documentation and repo-code mapping rather than a static branch audit.

ida.effect_summary: IDA headless is not provisioned for this doc-driven child record yet.

cross_verification.notes: This child record is currently doc-driven. No dedicated Ghidra+IDA parity artifact is attached yet.

doc_source.primary_contract: Microsoft documents DisableTaskOffload under TCPIP Parameters and documents SystemResponsiveness under the MMCSS SystemProfile key, including the path and rounding/clamping rules for SystemResponsiveness.
doc_source.repo_interpretation: This child record intentionally does not treat the MMCSS page as proof of NetworkThrottlingIndex semantics or as proof of one universal stock SystemResponsiveness default across all Windows builds.
doc_source.notes: The current app's 10 value is kept as a documented in-range child profile, not as a sweeping claim about every Windows baseline.
